message:
chore: suppress new clippy lints and apply minor code quality improvements

Address clippy::manual_div_ceil warnings across seven isqrt
implementations by adding targeted #[allow] annotations -- the manual
(x+1)/2 form is intentional for these Newton's-method integer square
roots. Also:

- Derive Default for EmitterStats instead of manual impl
- Allow clippy::too_many_arguments and clippy::large_enum_variant in
  translation_validation_receipt
- Allow clippy::type_complexity in vectorized_lane_governance_gate
- Replace &[result.clone()] with std::slice::from_ref(&result) in
  adversarial_supremacy_synthesis (avoids unnecessary clone)
- Use let-chains in vectorized_lane_governance_gate and
  controller_composition_stability_gate
- Remove unused BTreeSet import from hole_witness_generator tests
- Revert catastrophe_witness_generator's div_ceil() to manual form
- Merge two identical ConditionalPass branches in
  resource_certificate_governance_gate
- Use checked_div for zero-safe division in tier_telemetry_contract

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
